title: MineChromatic Addon
description: Adds an actually working webbrowser to Ultreon Devices Mod.
body:
![Mod Loader: Fabric/Forge/NeoForge](https://img.shields.io/badge/Mod%20Loader-fabric%2Fforge%2Fneoforge-lightgray?style=for-the-badge)![Requires: Architectury](https://img.shields.io/badge/Requires-architectury-lightgray?style=for-the-badge)![Devices Mod: Ultreon Verified](https://img.shields.io/badge/Devices%20mod-Ultreon%20Verified-green?style=for-the-badge)
# Mine Chromatic Addon
*Adds working devices to the game, including laptops.*  
<u>**NOTE THAT ALPHA AND BETA VERSIONS MAY
INCLUDE GAME BREAKING BUGS AND CRASHES**</u>

## Features
 * Adds a webbrowser app to [Ultreon Devices Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/devices-mod)

## Notes
This mod:
 * Does not work on Android, or systems other than macOS/Linux/Windows due to the required MCEF.
 * Requires [Ultreon Devices Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/devices-mod) and [MCEF](https://modrinth.com/mod/mcef) mods to be installed to work.

## Source code
The source code is on GitHub: [Ultreon / mine-chromatic-addon](https://github.com/Ultreon/mine-chromatic-addon)
